metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students explore modern music styles including pop, rock, hip-hop, and electronic music through performance, composition, and music technology. This course emphasizes creative expression using contemporary tools and production techniques while developing understanding of music's role in contemporary culture. Students work with digital audio production, songwriting, and performance in styles that reflect current musical landscapes.
metadata.general_description: Create and perform contemporary music using modern styles, composition techniques, and music production technology.

big_ideas.statement: Contemporary music styles reflect and shape modern culture, identity, and artistic expression.
big_ideas.elaboration: Pop, rock, hip-hop, electronic, and other contemporary music forms communicate cultural values, social messages, and personal expression; understanding these styles provides insight into contemporary society.

big_ideas.statement: Digital music technology expands possibilities for composition, arrangement, and sound creation.
big_ideas.elaboration: Recording software, synthesizers, music production tools, and digital platforms enable musicians to create, edit, and share music in ways that transform contemporary music practice.

big_ideas.statement: Songwriting and composition in contemporary styles require understanding of melodic, harmonic, and rhythmic structures.
big_ideas.elaboration: Creating original songs involves making deliberate choices about melody, chord progressions, rhythm, lyrics, and production elements to communicate artistic intention.

big_ideas.statement: Performance and recording in contemporary music require technical skill, stylistic authenticity, and artistic commitment.
big_ideas.elaboration: Contemporary musicians develop their ability to perform live or record in studio contexts, executing music with appropriate style, technique, and emotional expression.

competencies.raw: Create original compositions and songs in contemporary styles
i_can_statements: I can write original melodies using contemporary melodic approaches and phrasing
I can compose chord progressions and harmonic structures that support modern songs
I can develop rhythmic patterns and grooves appropriate to contemporary styles
I can create complete song arrangements including production elements

competencies.raw: Write lyrics that express ideas, emotions, and narratives authentically
i_can_statements: I can write lyrics that express personal perspective or tell meaningful stories
I can develop vocal melodies that support lyrical meaning and emotional content
I can craft lyrics that work rhythmically and phonetically within songs
I can revise and refine lyrics to strengthen their impact and coherence

competencies.raw: Use music production technology to create, arrange, and record music
i_can_statements: I can record and edit audio using digital audio workstations and recording software
I can arrange music using synthesizers, loops, and production techniques
I can mix and master recordings to achieve professional sound quality
I can experiment with production effects and techniques to create desired sonic textures

competencies.raw: Explore diverse contemporary music styles and influences
i_can_statements: I can perform or create music in multiple contemporary styles and genres
I can analyze and incorporate stylistic elements from various contemporary artists
I can blend influences from different music traditions in original compositions
I can develop personal artistic voice while drawing on diverse musical influences

competencies.raw: Analyze contemporary music and understand how elements create artistic meaning
i_can_statements: I can identify melodic, harmonic, and rhythmic structures in contemporary music
I can analyze how production techniques and sonic textures contribute to meaning
I can explain how lyrics and melody work together to express ideas and emotions
I can understand how contemporary music communicates cultural messages and values

competencies.raw: Evaluate my own compositions and performances critically
i_can_statements: I can assess the strengths and areas for development in my original compositions
I can evaluate my performance or recording quality against artistic goals
I can identify what is working effectively in my music and what needs refinement
I can set realistic goals for continued musical growth and development

competencies.raw: Understand the role of contemporary music in society and cultural expression
i_can_statements: I can recognize how contemporary music reflects social issues and contemporary concerns
I can understand how musicians use music to communicate, protest, celebrate, and build community
I can appreciate the diversity of contemporary music styles and their cultural origins
I can reflect on music's role in my own life and cultural identity

competencies.raw: Develop artistic judgment about composition and production choices
i_can_statements: I can distinguish between derivative imitation and creative interpretation in contemporary music
I can make informed decisions about when to follow style conventions and when to innovate
I can evaluate how well compositions achieve their intended artistic purpose
I can recognize innovative approaches to songwriting and music production

competencies.raw: Perform or record contemporary music with technical skill and authentic expression
i_can_statements: I can perform contemporary music with appropriate style, groove, and energy
I can sing or play with accuracy, clarity, and expressive interpretation
I can record music that demonstrates technical proficiency and artistic intent
I can present music in live or recorded formats that engage audiences

competencies.raw: Share compositions and musical ideas with peers and audiences
i_can_statements: I can present original compositions in classroom or performance contexts
I can articulate the artistic vision and inspiration behind my compositions
I can engage audiences through performance of contemporary music
I can share recordings and musical work through appropriate platforms and contexts

competencies.raw: Document musical work using notation, production files, and reflection
i_can_statements: I can notate compositions or create production documentation of musical work
I can maintain organized production files and recording sessions
I can write reflectively about compositional process and artistic choices
I can create artist statements that explain my musical vision and intent

competencies.raw: Communicate about music through discussion, analysis, and interpretation
i_can_statements: I can discuss music styles, artists, and cultural contexts knowledgeably
I can write analytical pieces about contemporary music and cultural significance
I can lead discussions about musical choices and artistic interpretation
I can present information about contemporary musicians and music trends clearly

competencies.raw: Connect contemporary music to other disciplines and art forms
i_can_statements: I can explore connections between music, visual art, and movement or theatre
I can understand how music reflects and responds to literature, history, and social issues
I can create multimedia projects that integrate music with other artistic elements
I can recognize how music collaborates with other disciplines in artistic expression

competencies.raw: Study professional musicians and diverse contemporary music traditions
i_can_statements: I can analyze and learn from the work of contemporary musicians and producers
I can explore music traditions from diverse cultures and contemporary contexts
I can identify stylistic innovations and influential approaches in contemporary music
I can understand how musicians develop and evolve their artistic practice

competencies.raw: Explore music creation as a career or ongoing artistic practice
i_can_statements: I can research career paths in music composition, performance, and production
I can develop a portfolio of original compositions and recordings
I can understand the business and technical aspects of music creation and distribution
I can engage with opportunities for mentorship and professional development in music

competencies.raw: Build community through music creation and sharing
i_can_statements: I can collaborate with other musicians on compositions and recordings
I can mentor peers in songwriting, production, or performance
I can use music to connect with others and build community
I can contribute to a culture that values musical creativity and contemporary artistic expression

areas.name: Contemporary Music Styles and Genres
topics: Pop music characteristics, songwriting conventions, and performance approaches
Rock music traditions, styles, and instrumentation
Hip-hop culture, production techniques, and lyrical expression
Electronic and dance music production and performance
R&B, soul, indie, and alternative music styles and approaches
Global contemporary music traditions and fusion styles

areas.name: Songwriting and Composition
topics: Melodic development and phrasing in contemporary songs
Harmonic structures and chord progressions in popular music
Rhythm, groove, and rhythmic patterns in contemporary styles
Lyric writing: narrative, poetry, and emotional expression
Song forms: verse-chorus, bridge structure, and contemporary arrangements
Originality and derivative work: citation, sampling, and creative quotation

areas.name: Music Production Technology and Recording
topics: Digital audio workstations and music production software
Recording techniques, microphone placement, and audio capture
Audio editing, arrangement, and multitrack production
Synthesizers, digital instruments, and sound design
Mixing and mastering for professional sound quality
Loops, samples, and production effects in contemporary music

areas.name: Performance, Cultural Expression, and Music Business
areas.raw: Performance, Cultural Expression, and Music Business
topics: Live performance techniques and stage presence in contemporary music
Music as cultural expression and social commentary
The role of social media and digital platforms in music sharing
Copyright, sampling rights, and fair use in music creation
Career pathways in music composition, production, and performance
Music industry overview: recording, publishing, and distribution
